Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Feb-14-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-11-29 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Continued To Feb-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:32 am and concluding at 9:36 am.

Plaintiff Bank of America N.A. is represented by Christopher Dana, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Michael Burdenski not appearing.

Counsel for plaintiff informs the Court that parties are entering into a settlement.

Counsel requests a continuance of the matter.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS Plaintiffs request for continuance; the matter is continued to February 14, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept 505.
